overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city plaza. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, reflective wet pavement, and distinctive cyberpunk architecture with a brief encounter with three seated monk-like figures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under curved megastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved building facade observing the illuminated floor panels and distant neon city lights

entered.detail: white curved structure with glowing cyan neon trim and smooth futuristic architecture
square glowing light panels embedded in the wet pavement reflecting rain
tall building facades covered with bright digital advertisements and neon signage
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows towering against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic curved building with glowing blue neon accents, the wet pavement reflects the vibrant city lights. Rain falls steadily in this relatively empty pedestrian area beneath an overhanging structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: meditation plaza with illuminated floor panels

events.description: three seated monk-like figures come into view kneeling on illuminated panels ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching three stationary figures kneeling on glowing floor panels in the plaza

notable_agents.action: three monks kneeling on illuminated squares with arms crossed, wearing red sashes and meditating in the rain

entered.detail: dark modern benches lining the left side of the plaza area
raised rectangular planters containing green hedges and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Approaching three seated figures kneeling on glowing floor panels in a small open plaza. The figures remain stationary in meditation poses as the camera moves closer and passes by them, with benches and planters visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with benches and vertical neon signage

events.description: exiting the meditation plaza into broader open area with street furniture and vertical neon building

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past benches and planters toward a building with prominent vertical neon lights

entered.detail: tall dark building with prominent vertical yellow neon light strips running up the facade
tall lamp posts with warm white lighting illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Moving past the seated figures into a more open plaza area lined with benches and hedge planters. A large building with prominent vertical yellow neon lights dominates the right side while street lamps illuminate the rainy walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: main pedestrian thoroughfare with holographic advertisements

events.description: large holographic sea creature advertisement becomes visible on left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking down the main pedestrian street observing large holographic advertisements and towering neon signage

entered.detail: large animated blue holographic whale or jellyfish swimming across the building facade
tall structure completely covered in digital advertisements and glowing neon panels
illuminated digital signboard displaying advertisements on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide pedestrian street lined with massive holographic billboards including a prominent animated sea creature on the left. The rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit city center surrounded by towering digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza that transitions from a secluded architectural corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched city center. It begins by gliding along a curved building with glowing blue accents, where steady rain creates vibrant reflections on the wet pavement beneath an overhanging structure. As the camera moves forward, the path opens into a small plaza where it passes three stationary, meditating figures kneeling on glowing floor panels. The scene then expands past benches and hedge planters toward a dominant building marked by vertical yellow neon lights, before turning onto a wide pedestrian street. Finally, the environment transforms into a dense digital canyon as the camera moves deeper into the city, flanked by towering holographic billboards and a massive animated sea creature.
